title: hymenophyllum applanatum
intro: Hymenophyllum applanatum, also known as the flat rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum applanatum include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Hymenophyllum applanatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
